title: alchemilla gracilis var. hillii
intro: Alchemilla gracilis var. hillii, also known as the Hill's Lady's Mantle, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae) and is native to Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Alchemilla gracilis var. hillii include its ability to soothe and calm the skin, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for skin issues and wound healing. Alchemilla gracilis var. hillii can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used topically to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation.
